text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It seems all my training paid off. I was able to
give a good performance.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to celebrate. I only did what was
expected.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
With today's race behind me, I have to prepare
for the next.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's not enough. I have to stack up victories, one
by one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega seems satisfied but retains a stern
face!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to tell me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I know to keep running... and keep winning.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I need to be faster, stronger.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll become the brightest star. Just wait and see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her eyes set dead ahead, I can see in her
face her desire for victory!
